---
title: BsUi
subtitle: "emulat'em"
execute:
  echo: false
---

> FIX OK .current and .accu OK restyle with queueMicrotask and MutationObserver

::: {#inputDiv}
<!-- inputDiv is considered Void-->
:::

// bsButton: Bootstrap-styled button, OJS-compatible, written as plain class javascript.


```{ojs}
import {bsButton} from "./bsui.js"

viewof run = new bsButton({
  label: "RAZ",
  variant: "warning",
  value: { action: "run" }
}).node()

run
```

<hr/>

```{ojs}
import { bsInput } from "./bsui.js"

viewof name = new bsInput({
  label: "Your name",
  placeholder: "Type here…",
  description: "bsInput: Bootstrap-styled text input, OJS-compatible as plain js class",
  value: "Pier"
}).node()

name
```

<hr/>


```{ojs}
import { bsInputgroup } from "./bsui.js"

viewof ig = new bsInputgroup({
  placeholder: "Type something…",
  buttonLabel: "Accumulate",
  variant: "success"
}).node()

ig.current

ig
```

```{ojs}
import { bsInputgroup3 } from "./bsui.js"

viewof ig3 = new bsInputgroup3({
  placeholder: "Hi Type something3…",
  prefixHTML: '<i class="bi bi-search"></i>',
  addLabel: "Add",
  resetLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "Clip",
  variant: "primary"
}).node()

ig3.current

ig3
```
